title: Claims+
description: Protect your land with style — golden shovel claims, intuitive GUIs, and full permission control.
body:
# Claims+ **A lightweight land claiming plugin for Minecraft servers.** Players select custom regions using a golden shovel and protect them with full permission control through clean in-game GUIs. ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909213239f460ed408d44229de5f49c45e41ca10_0.webp)
---
## How it works
1. Type **/claim** to receive the **Claim Shovel** (golden shovel). 2. Right-click two opposite corners to define your region. 3. Type **/claim confirm** to claim the area, or **/claim cancel** to abort. 4. Your region is now protected from other players. 5. Use **/claim manage** while standing in your claim to open the management GUI.
![Claiming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d1f3a59dbb3929b33332e89c9ab5cb0172cb087.png)
---
## Commands
| Command | Description | |:---|:---| | `/claim` | Enter selection mode and receive the Claim Shovel | | `/claim confirm` | Confirm and claim the selected region | | `/claim cancel` | Cancel the current selection | | `/claim add ` | Add a member to the claim you are standing in | | `/claim remove ` | Remove a member from the claim you are standing in | | `/claim manage` | Open the claim management GUI | | `/claim reload` | Reload the plugin configuration | | `/unclaim` | Unclaim the region you are standing in | **Aliases:** `/claims`, `/c+` ---
## Permissions
| Permission | Description | Default | |:---|:---|:---:| | `claimsplus.claim` | Allows claiming regions | All players | | `claimsplus.unclaim` | Allows unclaiming owned regions | All players | | `claimsplus.manage` | Allows managing claims via GUI | All players | | `claimsplus.admin` | Bypass all claim protections | OP only | | `claimsplus.claims.unlimited` | No limit on the number of claims | OP only | ---
## GUI Management ![Manage1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f91123412b528df0ca71bef6fb4b3fa172678b7.png) ![Manage2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1f965ed70896a98f5b4e2e6d762b80d69aa8f6.png) ![Manage3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a2b318c5c0c4aec6095a6cfb3b545626d951a3f.png)
---
## Protection
| Protection | Description | |:---|:---| | **Building** | Placing blocks | | **Destroying** | Breaking blocks | | **Interaction** | Doors, buttons, levers, pressure plates | | **Chest access** | Chests, barrels, hoppers, furnaces, brewing stands | | **Ender chest access** | Ender chests | | **Villager trading** | Trading with villagers | | **Animal damage** | Hitting passive mobs | | **PvP** | Player versus player combat | Each permission can be toggled individually per member or as a default for all non-members through the GUI. ---
## Features
| | | |:---|:---| | **Region-based claims** | Select any rectangular area, not limited to chunks | | **Golden shovel selection** | Visual and intuitive corner picking | | **Full GUI management** | Manage permissions, members, and claim info | | **Per-member permissions** | Grant specific abilities to individual players | | **Default permissions** | Control what non-members can do | | **Claim animations** | Particle effects on claim and unclaim | | **Border particles** | Animated edges and corner pillars | | **Enter-claim notifications** | Title and action bar when walking into a claim | | **Multi-language** | English, French, German, Spanish, Dutch | | **Configurable** | Max claims, animation speed, particle colors |
![Claim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f908bc4e761d02097019e6b09a116697118c423.png)
---
